description.initial: You sail through the southwestern waters, where the ocean begins to show signs of the Island of Bliss's proximity. The water here is warmer, almost tropical, and takes on a distinctive turquoise hue. Schools of colorful fish follow your boat, and the air feels different somehow, more alive.
description.return: The southwestern ocean. The waters grow warmer as you approach the island.
description.atmospheric: A sense of anticipation builds. Something lies ahead, you can feel it.

west.blockedMessage: The western ocean extends forever. Your path lies elsewhere.

interactables.name: Colorful Fish
interactables.examineText: A school of brightly colored fish follows your boat, their scales flashing in the sunlight. They seem almost to be guiding you.
